message:
feat(update): implement fleet-wide worker binary deployment

Connects the update_fleet function to the actual worker deployment
infrastructure, replacing the placeholder TODO with working code.

Changes:
- Import commands module for workers_deploy_binary access
- Dry run mode now actually simulates deployment via deploy_binary
- Live mode deploys rch-wkr to all configured workers
- Version-aware: skips workers already running the current version
- JSON output mode properly suppressed for dry-run messages

The deployment uses rsync-based binary transfer with:
- Automatic version checking before transfer
- Health verification after deployment
- Parallel worker updates when possible

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
